backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealership backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media, visitor stats, etc.), their ID counters, and type definitions. Includes mixins for blob storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file at the frontend root level.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang frontend app, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga/Niaga, Promo, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and auth-guarded admin routes, wrapped with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format, and submitting create/update mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component that displays a list of AdminRecord users with their principal, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid with blob URL previews.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity token validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status using corresponding React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with blob URL previews, copy-ID, and delete functionality, validating delegation identity and actor availability before destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking and delegation identity/actor validation before uploading.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated via props.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most-visited pages using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty-state handling. Accepts URL/count pairs as bigint tuples and truncates long URLs for display.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, converting bigint nanosecond timestamps to formatted dates. Includes loading skeleton and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: React component that protects admin routes by validating Internet Identity delegation, syncing the principal to localStorage, checking delegation expiry, and redirecting unauthenticated users to /login.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of five latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages via TanStack Router. Each item is rendered as a clickable button with a file icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with Call, WhatsApp, Simulasi Kredit, and Menu buttons, where the Menu button toggles a dropdown navigation overlay. Handles outside-click dismissal of the dropdown.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a commercial vehicle variant, defaulting to the first variant and notifying the parent via a callback on selection change.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner image (loaded from media assets for authenticated users or a static fallback) with an overlay containing a WhatsApp contact link built from website settings.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying dealer contact info, social media links, visitor stats (auto-refreshed every 15 seconds), and quick navigation links, all populated dynamically from website settings with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Renders a page-specific hero banner with a title, icon, background color, and subtitle determined by the current pathname. Adjusts text color for Mobil Niaga pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel section of up to 8 family car (Mobil Keluarga) vehicle cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
Displays a carousel section of up to 8 commercial vehicle (Mobil Niaga) cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the hero banner section using a configurable image from website settings (authenticated users) or a fallback static image, overlaid with the site name and tagline.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop links, and a mobile hamburger menu that closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle, tracking counts via the useProductInteractions hook and optionally triggering the native Web Share API.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicle cards fetched from the catalog, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: A search input section that redirects to the family car listing page with a query string when the user submits a search.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with two paragraphs describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback when the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price, and a link to its detail page.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language label, validation message, and status/action string constants used across the frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React hook that queries admin dashboard statistics from the backend actor; currently returns zeroed default values as the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting admin users via the backend actor, using `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post CRUD and publish-toggle operations; all mutation and query functions are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD; all backend methods are missing so queries return empty/null and mutations log warnings without calling the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data, with backward-compatibility aliases exported.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all contact submissions (stubbed to return empty array) and deleting a contact (stubbed mutation), with a backward-compatibility alias.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the data, with backward-compatibility aliases exported.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching all credit simulations (stubbed to return empty array) and deleting one (stubbed mutation).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all media assets, fetching by ID, uploading (with progress callback), and deleting media assets via the backend actor with authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share counts and mutations; all backend methods are missing so counts return 0 and mutations are no-ops, with a combined convenience hook for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed out with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with its catalog, both returning empty/null stubs as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a single React Query hook to fetch website settings from the backend actor, returning null on error with a 30-second stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials (get, create, update, delete), all stubbed with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations, toggling publish status, and fetching a vehicle catalog, all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch visitor stats (active), visitor trend, and page views (both disabled pending backend implementation).
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now does nothing, as tracking has been moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with protected mutation using the user's principal identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout with a collapsible sidebar containing navigation menu items, responsive mobile behavior, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears query cache and redirects to login.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page layout that wraps content with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Admin page for managing admin users with list, add, edit, and delete functionality using a dialog and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog articles with add/edit dialog and React Query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles management, noting the feature is not yet fully implemented.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that displays a sorted table of credit simulation submissions fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page showing stat cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and visitors using the useAdminStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page displaying a sorted table of contact/lead submissions from the website.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin page for uploading and browsing media assets, with cache invalidation after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with add/edit dialog support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit dialog support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit dialog and a confirmation alert dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page that displays real-time visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, online now, page views) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, plus trend and top-pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for editing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from backend and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, syncs auth tokens, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components including banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, displaying a 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog listing view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for visitor inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) that submits via the useContactForm hook.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a family car, showing vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, product interactions, and tabs for specifications and features.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family cars, fetching vehicle catalogs and rendering up to 8 vehicles as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, displaying up to 8 vehicles in a grid with a category heading.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Public detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing vehicle info, variant selector, pricing, product interactions, and tabs for specifications and features.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays a grid of three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category route.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions that shows a 'under development' message and directs users to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page that lets users select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, calculates estimated monthly installments, and submits the simulation via a mutation hook.
Placeholder page for customer testimonials that displays an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for frontend use that mirror backend types, covering entities like Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, and more.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a centralized ICP canister call wrapper with pre-call authentication validation, authorization error handling, and session management utilities for login/logout token sync.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single function that calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages authentication state persistence in localStorage by storing, retrieving, validating, and clearing the Internet Identity principal ID and session expiry metadata.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides form validation utility functions (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) and a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP identity validity, including expiration and anonymous principal detection.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides browser-side visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/persistence, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for an ICP/Internet Identity app, documenting two pending fix requests: updating `useActor` to use authenticated identity and redeploying a stopped backend canister.
